name: gradle-dagp
description: Analyzes and fixes Gradle module dependencies using the autonomousapps dependency-analysis-gradle-plugin (DAGP). Guides investigative triage of buildHealth / projectHealth / reason output instead of blindly running fixDependencies — prioritizes architecture, build speed, and maintainability. Handles convention plugins in buildSrc / build-logic, splits fixes into sensibly-batched PRs, and drafts upstream bug reports (with user confirmation) when DAGP advice is wrong.
